ham.subject: Ticket #9876 Resolved – Merge Request Approved
ham.body:
Hi Team,

I hope you are doing well. I am writing to inform you that the issue raised in JIRA ticket #9876 (Bug: XYZ-123) has been thoroughly investigated and resolved.

Key points:
- The root cause was a missing null‑check in the payment service.
- A hot‑fix has been merged into the main branch (commit a1b2c3d).
- All related pull requests (PR #45, PR #46) have been approved and merged.
- Automated integration tests now pass with a 0% failure rate.

Next steps:
1. Pull the latest main branch on your local machine.
2. Run `npm run test:integration` to confirm the fix locally.
3. Deploy to the staging environment and verify the transaction flow.

Please let me know if you encounter any issues or if further verification is needed. Thank you for your patience and cooperation.

Best regards,

Rahul Sharma
DevOps Lead
Tech Solutions Pvt. Ltd.

spam.subject: URGENT: Immediate Action Required – IT Helpdesk Ticket #5763
spam.body:
Dear Employee,

We have detected unusual activity on your corporate account. As part of our IT security protocol, we have opened an IT Helpdesk ticket (Ticket ID: 5763) for you. To protect your data and maintain compliance, you must verify your credentials immediately.

Please click the link below and follow the instructions within 24 hours. Failure to comply will result in temporary suspension of your account access.

Verify your credentials now: <URL>

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Regards,
IT Helpdesk Team

(Note: This is an automated notification. Please do not reply to this email.)
